notes: Level 9 packet 00-04 reviewed manually against canonical prose, structured markdown, and runtime JSON.
Closed findings preserve mechanics through current fields where possible; open findings name schema gaps instead of hiding them in prose.

astral-projection::created_object_or_str.issue: Actionable open: Astral body/body split, replicated statistics/possessions, and silver-cord death linkage need a dedicated linked-entity or dual-body schema to avoid remaining as utility prose.
astral-projection::created_object_or_str.recommendedTemplateChange: Add a linked form/body state bucket that can model an astral form, a suspended physical body, copied stats/equipment, and lethal cord linkage.
astral-projection::created_object_or_str.recommendedJsonChange: Add a structured linkedEntities or formSplit runtime object; current JSON keeps the facts in Utility Options and Unconscious status.

astral-projection::travel_or_planar_move.issue: Closed: Planar projection, Astral Plane travel, plane-exit re-entry, and caster dismissal are now split into Utility Options and a granted dismissal action.
astral-projection::travel_or_planar_move.recommendedTemplateChange: No new template field required for this pass beyond Utility Options and granted actions.
astral-projection::travel_or_planar_move.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON now has target count 9 plus Utility Options for planar travel and re-entry.

astral-projection::resource_or_consumpti.issue: Closed: The per-target consumed jacinth and silver bar requirement was already present in Components materialDescription, materialCost, and isConsumed.
astral-projection::resource_or_consumpti.recommendedTemplateChange: No template change required in this packet.
astral-projection::resource_or_consumpti.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON already records materialCost 1100 and isConsumed true.

astral-projection::object_stats_or_damag.issue: Actionable open: Damage/effect isolation between astral form and body needs a state-link schema; Utility Options can name the rule but cannot enforce separate health/effect pools.
astral-projection::object_stats_or_damag.recommendedTemplateChange: Add a separated-state bucket for mirrored forms whose damage/effects do not cross-apply.
astral-projection::object_stats_or_damag.recommendedJsonChange: Current JSON records Damage separation in Utility Options only.

astral-projection::status_or_state_chang.issue: Closed: The suspended physical body state is now represented by a STATUS_CONDITION Unconscious effect and matching structured Conditions Applied value.
astral-projection::status_or_state_chang.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON now includes a STATUS_CONDITION effect for Unconscious.

astral-projection::environmental_change.issue: Closed: The no food, no air, and no aging suspended-animation facts are now split into the Suspended body Utility Option.
astral-projection::environmental_change.recommendedTemplateChange: No new template field required for this pass.
astral-projection::environmental_change.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON controlOptions preserve the suspended-body upkeep rule.

astral-projection::conditional_ending.issue: Closed: The 0 HP, cord cut, plane already occupied, and Magic-action dismissal endings are now represented in Utility Options and a granted dismissal action.
astral-projection::conditional_ending.recommendedTemplateChange: A future linked-state schema could enforce these endings more directly, but the actionable extraction is no longer hidden.
astral-projection::conditional_ending.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON records dismissal as a granted action and the other endings in controlOptions.

astral-projection::aftermath_or_memory.issue: Closed: The return to body and exit from suspended animation when the spell ends are now named in the Magic-action dismissal and Planar re-entry options.
astral-projection::aftermath_or_memory.recommendedTemplateChange: No new template field required in this pass.
astral-projection::aftermath_or_memory.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON controlOptions preserve return aftermath.

blade-of-disaster::attack_or_save_modifi.issue: Actionable open: The current runtime schema can record hit damage and attack prose, but cannot machine-express two attacks per activation or an 18+ critical threshold.
blade-of-disaster::attack_or_save_modifi.recommendedTemplateChange: Add an attack-sequence bucket with attack count, attack origin, attack reach, and critical threshold fields.
blade-of-disaster::attack_or_save_modifi.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON now records base and critical damage plus Utility Options for two attacks and the 18+ critical threshold.

blade-of-disaster::target_filter_or_elig.issue: Closed: Initial targeting now points at an unoccupied space, and Utility Options identify secondary attack targets as creatures, loose objects, or structures within 5 feet of the blade.
blade-of-disaster::target_filter_or_elig.recommendedTemplateChange: No new template field required for this pass.
blade-of-disaster::target_filter_or_elig.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON targeting is point-based with creatures and objects in validTargets, plus spatial details for attack reach.

blade-of-disaster::sustain_or_recast_act.issue: Closed: The bonus-action move-and-attack loop is now represented as a granted bonus action, movement effect, and Utility Option.
blade-of-disaster::sustain_or_recast_act.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON now includes grantedActions and MOVEMENT for the bonus-action blade movement.

blade-of-disaster::terrain_or_surface.issue: Closed: The unoccupied-space placement and barrier-passage rule are now split into targeting, spatial details, and Utility Options.
blade-of-disaster::terrain_or_surface.recommendedTemplateChange: No new template field required for this pass.
blade-of-disaster::terrain_or_surface.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON records point targeting and Barrier passage as a control option.

blade-of-disaster::vision_light_sound.issue: Closed: The visible unoccupied space requirement is already carried by lineOfSight and now named in the Planar blade and movement options.
blade-of-disaster::vision_light_sound.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON keeps lineOfSight true and the visible-space wording in controlOptions.

blade-of-disaster::created_object_or_str.issue: Actionable open: A created planar rift that attacks from its own location needs a created hazard/entity schema; current fields preserve its length, movement, and attack facts but not as an owned entity.
blade-of-disaster::created_object_or_str.recommendedTemplateChange: Add a created effect-origin or hazard-entity bucket for movable spell-created attackers.
blade-of-disaster::created_object_or_str.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON records spatial details, movement, granted action, and Utility Options as an interim representation.

blade-of-disaster::travel_or_planar_move.issue: Closed: The planar-rift nature and harmless passage through barriers are now explicit Utility Options rather than being hidden in description.
blade-of-disaster::travel_or_planar_move.recommendedTemplateChange: No new template field required for this pass.
blade-of-disaster::travel_or_planar_move.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON controlOptions preserve planar rift and barrier passage.

foresight::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: Actionable open: Foresight grants Advantage on all D20 Tests; runtime can express attack and saving throw pieces, but ability-check advantage still lacks a dedicated field.
foresight::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedTemplateChange: Add a D20 test modifier bucket covering attacks, saves, and ability checks together.
foresight::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON now records saving throw advantage, outgoing attack advantage, incoming attack disadvantage, and a Utility Option for full D20 Test advantage.

foresight::vision_light_sound.issue: Closed: The future-sight wording is descriptive explanation for the mechanical Advantage/Disadvantage package, now represented by defensive, attack-roll, and Utility Option entries.
foresight::vision_light_sound.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON preserves the mechanics without adding a flavor-only bucket entry.

foresight::conditional_ending.issue: Closed: The recast-ending rule is now a dedicated Utility Option.
foresight::conditional_ending.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON controlOptions include Recast ending.

gate::choice_or_mode.issue: Closed: Portal destination, orientation/diameter choice, and named-creature option are now separated through Utility Options and an AI prompt.
gate::choice_or_mode.recommendedTemplateChange: No new template field required for this pass.
gate::choice_or_mode.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON now has playerInputRequired true and a prompt for destination, orientation, diameter, and named creature.

gate::target_filter_or_eligibility.issue: Closed: The unoccupied visible-space portal anchor and named true creature restriction are now named in targeting/spatial fields and Utility Options.
gate::target_filter_or_eligibility.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON keeps point targeting and controlOptions for named creature restrictions.

gate::vision_light_sound.issue: Closed: Destination visibility through the portal is now split into a dedicated Utility Option.
gate::vision_light_sound.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON controlOptions include Destination visibility.

gate::message_or_communication.issue: Closed: The spoken specific creature name requirement is now captured as the Named creature pull option and in the AI prompt.
gate::message_or_communication.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON prompt asks for any specific true creature name spoken.

gate::travel_or_planar_movement.issue: Actionable open: Gate is a persistent two-sided planar portal with one-way front traversal and ruler vetoes; current movement fields can only approximate transport, not portal topology.
gate::travel_or_planar_movement.recommendedTemplateChange: Add a portal/travel topology bucket for two-ended portals, one-way sides, ruler/domain vetoes, and nearest-space placement.
gate::travel_or_planar_movement.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON now records a MOVEMENT teleport effect and detailed Utility Options for portal topology.

imprisonment::choice_or_mode.issue: Closed: The five imprisonment modes are now split into named Utility Options, and the AI prompt asks the caster to choose one.
imprisonment::choice_or_mode.recommendedTemplateChange: No new template field required for this pass.
imprisonment::choice_or_mode.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON controlOptions list Burial, Chaining, Hedged Prison, Minimus Containment, and Slumber.

imprisonment::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: Closed: The Wisdom saving throw is already represented by Save Stat and is now used on status/movement runtime effects.
imprisonment::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON status and movement effects use a Wisdom save condition.

imprisonment::terrain_or_surface.issue: Closed: Burial, Chaining, Hedged Prison, and Minimus Containment are now separated as Utility Options instead of being hidden in the paragraph.
imprisonment::terrain_or_surface.recommendedTemplateChange: No new template field required for this pass.
imprisonment::terrain_or_surface.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON controlOptions preserve the terrain, force-globe, chains, demiplane, and gemstone containment facts.

imprisonment::vision_light_sound.issue: Closed: Minimus Containment light-passage and visibility facts are now captured in its Utility Option.
imprisonment::vision_light_sound.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON controlOptions preserve the light-passage rule.

imprisonment::sensor_or_remote_perceptio.issue: Closed: The anti-divination clause is now split into the Divination and teleport block Utility Option.
imprisonment::sensor_or_remote_perceptio.recommendedTemplateChange: No new template field required for this pass.
imprisonment::sensor_or_remote_perceptio.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON controlOptions preserve the anti-divination rule.

imprisonment::created_object_or_structur.issue: Actionable open: The prison/globe/chains/demiplane/gemstone created containment forms need a durable created-prison schema with containment, passability, and dispel targets.
imprisonment::created_object_or_structur.recommendedTemplateChange: Add a created containment/prison bucket for durable prisons with mode-specific boundaries and dispel targets.
imprisonment::created_object_or_structur.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON records each form in Utility Options and spatial measured details but not as created prison objects.

imprisonment::ward_alarm_or_trigger.issue: Closed: The observable ending trigger and 9th-level Dispel Magic ending are now separated into Utility Options and the AI prompt.
imprisonment::ward_alarm_or_trigger.recommendedTemplateChange: No new template field required for this pass.
imprisonment::ward_alarm_or_trigger.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON controlOptions include Ending trigger and Ninth-level dispel.

imprisonment::travel_or_planar_movement.issue: Closed: Teleport prevention and Hedged Prison planar-travel warding are now explicit in a Utility Option and MOVEMENT stop effect.
imprisonment::travel_or_planar_movement.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON includes MOVEMENT stop for teleport/planar travel prevention.

imprisonment::social_or_knowledge_effect.issue: Closed: The DM-approved observable ending trigger is now captured in Utility Options and player prompt instead of only prose.
imprisonment::social_or_knowledge_effect.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON prompt asks for the ending trigger.

imprisonment::status_or_state_change.issue: Closed: Imprisoned, Restrained, and Unconscious are now structured Conditions Applied with matching STATUS_CONDITION effects.
imprisonment::status_or_state_change.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON includes STATUS_CONDITION effects for Imprisoned, Restrained, and Unconscious.

imprisonment::environmental_change.issue: Closed: No breathing, eating, drinking, aging, passability, and size-change facts are now preserved in Utility Options and existing spatial details.
imprisonment::environmental_change.recommendedTemplateChange: No new template field required for this pass.
imprisonment::environmental_change.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON controlOptions and measuredDetails preserve these facts.

imprisonment::conditional_ending.issue: Closed: Save immunity, observable ending trigger, and 9th-level Dispel Magic ending are now separated into Utility Options.
imprisonment::conditional_ending.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON controlOptions preserve the conditional endings.

imprisonment::aftermath_or_memory.issue: Closed: This finding resolved into upkeep/ending mechanics rather than a separate aftermath mechanic; the relevant pieces are now in Utility Options.
imprisonment::aftermath_or_memory.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON has no separate aftermath field because no distinct post-effect memory/aftermath rule exists after review.
